productDisplayName: Fossil Men Black Dial Chronograph Watch JR1266
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel circular case, has a fixed bezel, stainless steel backDial style: Black dial, has glow-in-the-dark hour, minutes and seconds hands, glow-in-the-dark markingsFeatures: Three-faced chronograph display, a date aperture, a screw and two press-buttons to reset the time and functions Strap style: Black bracelet-style steel strap, secured with a butterfly claspWater-resistant up to 50 mComes in an authentic Fossil collectible tinWarranty: 2 years international warranty from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects onlyWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
